rule_metadata.name: sudoSnatch
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'sudoSnatch' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule sudoSnatch
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'sudoSnatch' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "sudoSnatch"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = "/credentials/SudoSnatch"
		$string2 = /nIFS\=.{0,1000}\sread\s\-s\spass\\necho\s\-e\s.{0,1000}User\=.{0,1000}\$\(whoami\).{0,1000}Password\=.{0,1000}\$pass.{0,1000}\>\s\/var\/tmp/

	condition:
		any of them
}
